old: Tumor cell surface PD-L1 binds PD-1 on antigen-experienced CD8 T cells.
new: Tumor cell surface PD-L1 interacts with PD-1 on T cells.

old: Binding of tumor cell surface PD-L1 to PD-1 on antigen-experienced CD8 T cells inactivates antigen-experienced CD8 T cells.
new: Binding of tumor cell surface PD-L1 to PD-1 inactivates T cells.

old: IFN-γ increases exosomal PD-1 binding in a concentration-dependent manner.
new: Exosomal PD-L1 binds PD-1 in a concentration-dependent manner, and IFN-γ treatment increases exosomal PD-L1 levels and correspondingly increases exosome binding to PD-1.
